overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting smooth forward travel along railway tracks through a rocky mountain cutting toward a stone tunnel entrance. The environment features natural wilderness with scattered pine trees, gravel ballast, and clear blue skies.

stone masonry arch tunnel entrance cutting through the mountain ridge
tall evergreen pine trees on the ridge line above the cutting
tall evergreen pine trees on the ridge line above the cutting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves smoothly along railway tracks through a rocky mountain cutting, approaching a stone tunnel entrance in the distance. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight with clear skies visible above the rock walls, while scattered pine trees line the ridge tops on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a railway line that leads from an open mountain cutting toward the dark mouth of a stone tunnel. It begins by gliding smoothly over the gravel ballast, flanked by steep, rocky walls under the glare of bright midday sunlight. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts to reveal scattered pine trees clinging to the ridge tops against a clear blue sky. The scene then narrows as the rocky corridor guides the view closer to the looming stone architecture of the tunnel entrance.
